title: RPG Mob Levelling
description: Level up your world with a whole new way to experience monsters. This mod introduces a dynamic RPG-style leveling system that makes every encounter more challenging, rewarding, and unique.
body:
![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **📝About:**
Level up your world with a whole new way to experience monsters. This mod introduces a dynamic RPG-style leveling system that makes every encounter more challenging, rewarding, and unique. With highly customizable settings, you have full control over how monsters scale—whether you want a gradual difficulty curve or brutal, high-stakes combat from the start. Fine-tune attributes, growth rates, and behavior to match your ideal gameplay style.
![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **⚙️Features:**
- Distance based Levelling System for Mobs.
- Above mobs there is LVL text.
- What you killed Chat or Action Bar message.
- How many XP you got Chat or Action Bar Message.
- Mob LVL based XP earning.
- Dimension based LVL start. (For example Nether starts with 20, End with 50, Overworld with 1)
- Boss based LVL. (For example the Wither has a fixed 50 level while the Dragon has 100 level)
- You can set the coordinates from where the mod is counting the distance.
- You can set which mobs is in the Levelling System, all mobs or only the Monsters.
- In-Game config from 1.21.8.
- Fully Customizable.

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
